description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in a modern, urban streetwear style. He wears a sleeveless, hooded long vest with metallic spikes on one shoulder and visible buckles on the front, layered over a fitted shirt. His arms are tattooed, and he sports fingerless gloves, adding to the edgy aesthetic. The pants are slim-fit with graphic skeletal designs on one leg and a contrasting red panel on the other, paired with white sneakers. He wears a baseball cap and a face mask, partially obscuring his facial features. The overall look is accessorized with metallic elements and a layered, tactical vibe, suitable for a contemporary city environment.
description: Urban male pedestrian in edgy streetwear with a hooded vest, spiked shoulder, graphic pants, and a cap with face mask. Tattoos, gloves, and metallic details complete the modern, tactical look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded vest with buckles, spiked shoulder, tattoos, gloves, graphic pants, and face mask.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiked shoulder, arm tattoos, and the layered look of the vest and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the laced-up back of the vest, the cap's back, and the asymmetrical pant design.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the non-spiked arm, glove, and the contrasting red panel on the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a sleeveless hooded vest, fitted shirt, slim-fit graphic pants, fingerless gloves, and a baseball cap
